==============  2  ===============
./openshift-install create manifests

===============  3  =================
 ./openshift-install create ignition-configs
.
├── auth
│   ├── kubeadmin-password
│   └── kubeconfig
├── bootstrap.ign
├── master.ign
├── metadata.json
└── worker.ign

=====================================================
Installing FCOS and starting the OKD bootstrap process

1: Obtain the SHA512 digest for each of your Ignition config files
    sha512sum <installation_directory>/bootstrap.ign
bootstrap.ign

master.ign

worker.ign


2: Run the coreos-installer command and 
sudo coreos-installer install \
--copy-network \
--ignition-url=http://10.3.18.98:88/ignition/<bootstrap|master|worker>.ign  /dev/vda \
--ignition-hash=sha512-<digest>  
--insecure
--insecure-ignition
